channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Adam Schiff Acknowledges Trump DOJ May Have Case Against Newsom
Greenspan's Playbook Expected to Return Under Warsh
item.description: Alan Greenspan's notable central banking traits and his greatest shortcomings are set to be revisited under new leadership.

item.title: Federal Judge Blocks Trump Admin Subpoena of Walz in Immigration Probe
item.description: A federal judge halted a Trump administration subpoena of Minnesota Governor Tim Walz, calling it an overreach.

item.title: Blue State Faces Scrutiny for Delayed Removal of Illegal Immigrant from Voter Roll
item.description: Maryland GOP lawmaker says two-year delay in removing an illegal immigrant from voter rolls undermines election trust.
